Metadata.title: MIARADIA | Development and Environmental Governance in Madagascar
Metadata.description: MIARADIA is an association committed to socio-economic development, local governance and environmental protection in Madagascar.
Metadata.keywords: MIARADIA, Madagascar, development, environment, governance, NGO
Metadata.author: MIARADIA Association

Hero.title: MIARADIA Association of Intellectuals
Hero.subtitle: Working together for development and progress in Madagascar
Hero.description: MIARADIA is an association engaged in socio-economic development, training, local governance support and employment promotion in Madagascar since 2002.

History.title: History
History.p1: The MIARADIA Association of Intellectuals was created on June 17, 2002 in Fianarantsoa under Ordinance No. 60-133.
History.p2: It was founded by professionals and intellectuals committed to the socio-economic development of Madagascar.
History.p3: Since its creation, MIARADIA has supported local authorities, organizations and partners in implementing sustainable development projects.

Mission.title: Our Mission
Mission.main_goal: To contribute to the socio-economic, cultural and environmental development of Madagascar.
Mission.description: MIARADIA works to support local communities, provide training, promote employment and strengthen the capacities of local actors.
Mission.goal_1: Reduce unemployment and promote self-employment among intellectuals.
Mission.goal_2: Enhance members' skills and professional experience.
Mission.goal_3: Support local authorities in planning and governance.
Mission.goal_4: Promote sustainable and community development projects.

Activities.title: Activities & Fields of Action
Activities.subtitle: Our actions focus on training, local development and community project support
Activities.card_1_desc: Assisting municipalities in developing local development plans and strategies.
Activities.card_2_desc: Organizing technical and professional training in various fields.
Activities.card_3_desc: Support in designing, structuring and financing micro and community projects.
Activities.card_4_desc: Conducting socio-economic and environmental studies and project evaluations.
Activities.card_5_desc: Training in governance, planning, management and local development.
Activities.card_6_desc: Supporting employment creation and entrepreneurship development.

Projects.title: Services and Funding History
Projects.subtitle: Track record of MIARADIA projects in governance, conservation, community development and environmental law enforcement.

pcd-2002.title: Training and PCD Development
pcd-2002.description: Training and support for developing communal development plans (PCD) in 15 rural communes of the former Fianarantsoa province.

pcd-2003.title: PCD & PDV + Natural Resource Transfer Support
pcd-2003.description: Support for developing communal development plans and natural resource management transfer in several districts.

transfer-2006.title: Natural Resource Management Transfer
transfer-2006.description: Support for developing management transfer contracts for 4 NAP base communities.

org-2008.title: Farmer Organization Strengthening
org-2008.description: Capacity building for 10 farmer organizations benefiting from MPI sub-projects.

pact-feasibility-2010.title: Conservation Pact Feasibility Study
pact-feasibility-2010.description: Feasibility study of the Conservation Pact at 7 COBA sites.

pact-impl-2011.title: Conservation Pact Implementation
pact-impl-2011.description: Support for implementing the Conservation Pact for 5 COBA.

gef-2011.title: Community Natural Resource Management
gef-2011.description: Support for MIKEA forest zone management transfer and COBA strengthening.

nutrition-2013.title: Nutrition and Community Services Program
nutrition-2013.description: Management and implementation of nutrition services in Haute Matsiatra region.

health-2018.title: Community Health and Nutrition
health-2018.description: Intervention in PARN project areas to improve nutritional outcomes.

pcd-2018.title: Communal Development Plans (PCD)
pcd-2018.description: Development of communal development plans in several rural communes.

sage-2020.title: Environmental Management Plan (SAGE)
sage-2020.description: Supervision of the environmental management plan for community environmental governance.

cofav-2026.title: Law Enforcement & COFAV Protection Program
cofav-2026.description: Funding for environmental law enforcement and COFAV forest corridor protection.

Team.title: Our Team
Team.subtitle: A multidisciplinary team of experts committed to Madagascar's development

Cofav.title: Strengthening Law Enforcement for COFAV Protection
Cofav.subtitle: Project funded by Conservation Allies to protect forest resources.

brigade.title: Conservation Brigade
brigade.description: Deployment of conservation brigades inside COFAV and its core conservation zones.

dissuasion.title: Illegal Occupant Deterrence
dissuasion.description: Awareness raising and deterrence actions to reduce illegal occupation and environmental degradation.

community.title: Community Mobilization
community.description: General policing tours and community engagement to strengthen conservation awareness.

dialogue.title: Community Dialogue
dialogue.description: Facilitating discussions with local communities to identify sustainable conservation solutions.

patrol.title: Forest Patrols
patrol.description: Day and night patrols along strategic routes to monitor illegal forest product trafficking.

enforcement.title: Law Enforcement
enforcement.description: Detection of violations, prosecution of forest offenses and enforcement of environmental regulations.

Footer.description: MIARADIA supports socio-economic development, training and community projects in Madagascar since 2002.
Footer.grant_description: COFAV corridor protection - forest conservation and law enforcement in the forest conservation domain across Haute Matsiatra, Ihorombe, and Atsimo Atsinanana regions.
